name: Brittany Watkins
title: Real Estate Agent
bio: Brittany has over 10 years of experience in luxury residential real estate. She specializes in helping families find their dream homes and has closed more than 300 transactions across the tri-state area.

name: Michelle Ramirez
title: Senior Real Estate Agent
bio: Michelle is a top-performing agent with expertise in commercial and residential properties across New York. She is known for sharp negotiation and white-glove client service.

name: Mike Moore
title: Real Estate Agent
bio: Mike brings years of market analysis and negotiation experience to help clients get the best deals. He treats every transaction as if it were his own investment.

name: Patricia Fuller
title: Luxury Property Specialist
bio: Patricia specializes in high-end luxury properties and has closed over $100M in transactions. Her discretion and attention to detail are unmatched.

name: David Chen
title: Senior Investment Advisor
bio: David helps investors build diversified real estate portfolios. With a background in finance, he pairs market data with on-the-ground insight to maximize returns.

name: Sarah Johnson
title: First-Time Buyer Specialist
bio: Sarah guides first-time buyers through every step with patience and clarity. She loves turning renters into proud homeowners and demystifying the mortgage process.
